name_en: Upgraded Classic Calfskin Zipper Wallet Loewe
name_cn:
Upgraded Classic Calfskin Zipper Wallet Loewe
Patchwork Calfskin Zipper Wallet inspired by the Puzzle bag, featuring a unique geometric pattern. This version is made of contrasting color classic calfskin.
Calfskin lining
Model: L1130
Size: 19*10cm
